text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, provides your body with essential nutrients. Equally important is regular exercise, which can be as simple as a daily walk or a bike ride. Don't underestimate the power of good sleep – aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover and your mind stay sharp. Finally, pay attention to your mental health by managing stress and creating a work-life balance. Taking breaks and spending time with loved ones are just as vital as work. Small, consistent choices in each of these areas can lead to a happier, healthier you.
